title: Iam Music Player
body:
# Iam Music Player
This mod adds a boombox that can play music in the game.  
Create playlists to share music with multiple users.

Supports playback in multiplayer.

Dependent mods

Both  
[Otyacraft Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/otyacraft-engine)  
[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)  
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)  

Fabric  
[Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)

Quilt  
[Quilt Standard Libraries](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)


Option mods  
[Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli/versions)  An manual book will be added in the game
